goals.short_name: B.C.'s forests are stewarded sustainably for future generations

main_services.name: Reforest and monitor forest health after harvesting
Protect old growth forests and plan forest landscapes
Prepare and track a forest stewardship plan

goals.short_name: Crown timber is allocated, priced and harvested responsibly

main_services.name: Get rights to harvest Crown timber
Get a permit for personal timber use on Crown land
Register, mark and transport harvested timber
Get timber priced, measured and sold

goals.short_name: British Columbians stay safe from wildfire and burn responsibly

main_services.name: Prevent wildfires and follow fire restrictions
Work safely in forestry and timber sale operations

goals.short_name: Forest workers, businesses and communities adapt to a changing sector

main_services.name: Get support through forestry sector change
Grow value-added wood manufacturing and trade

acts.summary: The core statute governing forest tenures, timber pricing, timber marking, timber sale licences, free use permits and harvesting rights on Crown land in British Columbia.

sections.title: Woodlot licences
sections.description: Content and award of woodlot licences, granting exclusive rights to manage and harvest Crown timber within a small licence area.

services.name: Apply for a woodlot licence
services.ms_name: Get rights to harvest Crown timber

sections.title: Community forest agreements
sections.description: Applications, content and replacement of community forest agreements held by local governments, community groups and First Nations.

services.name: Apply for a community forest agreement
services.ms_name: Get rights to harvest Crown timber

sections.title: Licences to cut
sections.description: Occupant, master, forestry and fibre supply licences to cut timber outside of a major area-based tenure.

services.name: Get a licence to cut timber on Crown land
services.ms_name: Get rights to harvest Crown timber

sections.title: Roads and rights of way
sections.description: Issuance and content of road permits authorizing construction and use of forestry resource roads, including timber harvesting rights within the right-of-way.

services.name: Get a road permit to build a forestry resource road
services.ms_name: Get rights to harvest Crown timber

sections.title: Free use permits for First Nations and others
sections.description: Issuance and content of free use permits authorizing removal of minor volumes of Crown timber for personal, traditional, cultural, scientific or agricultural purposes.

services.name: Get a free-use permit for firewood
services.ms_name: Get a permit for personal timber use on Crown land

services.name: Get a free use permit for cultural, scientific or agricultural timber use
services.ms_name: Get a permit for personal timber use on Crown land

sections.title: Christmas tree permits and government use
sections.description: Issuance of free use Christmas tree permits authorizing the public to cut a Christmas tree on Crown land for personal use.

services.name: Get a permit to cut a Christmas tree on Crown land
services.ms_name: Get a permit for personal timber use on Crown land

sections.title: Timber marking
sections.description: Requirement to mark timber, including private timber marks required to transport logs from privately-owned land.

services.name: Apply for a private timber mark
services.ms_name: Register, mark and transport harvested timber

sections.title: Manufacture in British Columbia
sections.description: Requirement that Crown timber and residuals be used or manufactured in B.C., subject to exemption and provincial/federal export permits.

services.name: Apply to export logs from British Columbia
services.ms_name: Register, mark and transport harvested timber

sections.title: Payments to the government
sections.description: Stumpage rate determination and payment for Crown timber, including appraisal, cruise and scale-based pricing.

services.name: Look up stumpage rates for Crown timber
services.ms_name: Get timber priced, measured and sold

sections.title: Timber sale licences
sections.description: Content of timber sale licences used by BC Timber Sales to competitively auction Crown timber.

services.name: Bid on a BC Timber Sales timber sale licence
services.ms_name: Get timber priced, measured and sold

sections.title: Cutting permits
sections.description: Requirement to obtain an approved cutting permit before harvesting; agreement holders must have an approved forest stewardship plan in effect, and salvage of wildfire-damaged timber is authorized through cutting permits, forestry licences to cut, or occupant licences to cut.

services.name: Prepare a forest stewardship plan for your tenure
services.ms_name: Prepare and track a forest stewardship plan

sections.title: Allowable annual cut
sections.description: The chief forester determines the allowable annual cut for each timber supply area and tree farm licence based on environmental, social and economic factors.

acts.summary: Governs how forest and range practices and resource-based activities are conducted on Crown land, including stocking standards, reforestation obligations and forest health.

sections.title: Stocking and reforestation standards
sections.description: The chief forester sets seed, seedling and stocking standards for reforestation of B.C.'s forests, tracked through RESULTS silviculture reporting.

services.name: Report silviculture surveys and reforestation data
services.ms_name: Reforest and monitor forest health after harvesting

acts.summary: Defines legal responsibilities and obligations for fire use, wildfire prevention, wildfire control and rehabilitation in British Columbia. In force since March 31, 2005.

sections.title: Prohibition, restriction and leave area orders
sections.description: Authorizes open fire prohibition orders (s.10), equipment/activity prohibition orders (s.12), area restriction orders (s.11) and leave area orders (s.13).

services.name: Check current campfire bans and fire restrictions
services.ms_name: Prevent wildfires and follow fire restrictions

sections.title: Category 3 open fire requirements
sections.description: Defines category 3 open fires and requires burn registration through the Open Fire Tracking System, fuel breaks and fire suppression readiness.

services.name: Register a Category 3 open fire
services.ms_name: Prevent wildfires and follow fire restrictions
